Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank is headed to SC to spend a day with some of his favorites young pals at The Boy's Farm in Newberry. Hank & the boys target stripers on beautiful Lake Murray.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Fishing for stripers on Lake Murray
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kids with life-threatenting illnesses are in need of help & hope. Today Hank shares his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Making dreams a reality
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank shares the water with some youth bass anglers. He teaches the anglers how to read and fish new water.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Alabama Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker goes after the fish on Lake Monticello with friend Bobby Williams.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Monticello
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day catching fish with well-known Christian author Dennis Rainey.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Grosse Savanne Bass Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank and close friend/business partner, Keith Kelly return to Hank's premiere signature lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Big Bass at Rockhouse Farms
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fom South Carolina to Texas, today's show covers 1,500 miles of bass fishing & baseball fun. Hank's grandson pitcher, Alec takes a break from sports camp to join "pawpaw."
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: 'Pitching' for bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank sets out with two next-generation fishermen... high schoolers with a hunger for the outdoors. He shares his tricks of the trade as he & his young friends land some big bass using a variety baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker: High School Bassin'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day on Lake Hartwell chasing after the fish and sharing his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation friends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Hartwell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Video.summary: Spring Walleye fishing on Horwood Lake friendly competition with local anglers using crank baits and jigging.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | More Spring Walleyes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode, we venture out onto Porcupine Lake for some beautiful walleye action with Craig Salmonson from Timmins Angling Adventures. Patience was key as we waited for a break in challenging weather conditions—but it all paid off with an unforgettable day on the water. Tune in for expert tips, stunning scenery, and the thrill of fishing in Northern Ontario!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Weathering the Storm: Walleye on Porcupine Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Ty Sjodin have so much fun in North Dakota where the feedbag is on.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Fantastic Fishing In North Dakota
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing for Health, how fishing helps Law Enforcement personnel cope with the stressors of the job.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Fishing for Health
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Former U.S. Army Sergeant and former Alaska State Trooper, Erik Hill hits the Wisconsin waters to lure more than just bass to the surface. He shares the story of his life, his service, and his struggles since returning from war.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Army Veteran Erik Hill
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In June 1941, Leo Wolfson's life took an unexpected turn when he was drafted into the Army. World War II had arrived, and Leo was stationed on the islands of Hawaii only months after the bombing of Pearl Harbor. Tasked with being a soldier and an entertainer, Leo rose to the occasion on both fronts. Leo's wit and humor are intact, and he shares his stories and personal experience in WWII.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - WWII Veteran Leo Wolfson
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us on an exhilarating journey deep into the heart of Northern Ontario as we tackle mid-summer walleye fishing like never before! Guided by the rising sun, we gear up with our Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake for a day filled with fishing action and good times. Joining the adventure is Mercury Canada Marketing Manager Cameron Racine, adding expertise and excitement to this unforgettable outing. Don't miss the fun, the fish, and the breathtaking scenery!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Northern Adventures: Mid-Summer Walleye Quest with Cameron Racine from Mercury Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hook Line and Snook
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Hook Line and Snook
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Tube baits—whether texas-rigged or exposed jighead, are considered an all-around staple to smallmouth anglers. This week Kim enlightens us on the beneficial characteristics of each as well as the scent of coffee. Strike King Coffee Tubes are featured.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Wake Up and Smell the Coffee
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett heads to Steamboat Springs Colorado to fly fish the amazing Yampa River for trophy trout with guest Gary Buschy
Video.grandparentTitle: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors — Shadow Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Tennessee River fishing guide and bass tournament record holder, Rogne Brown joins host, Kim Stricker to share grass fishing tips and his developed sense of awareness while on the water. Strike King’s Sexy Dawg walking bait is the featured presentation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook n' Look — Chickamauga Chunks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kim demonstrates the virtues of a Strike King KVD "Deep" 1.5 Crankbait along weed edges. Once the bass are located, he follows up with a Swinging Swim Jig. As customary, he provides visual confirmation of the pattern from the lake bottom.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Right Under Your Nose
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James and Al Lindner head to the Alexandria area to catch smallmouth bass using some proven and new finesse tactics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finesse Tactics For Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: U.S. Army veteran Victoria Phillips share her history of unimaginable trauma. Viewer discretion is advised.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victoria Phillips
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Ice Fishing is here! This week, we're heading north on the hunt for solid ice! We'll be meeting up with our friends from Eskimo, Bite Me Box, and Beavertail baits to catch some perch!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch

Video.summary: This week, we’re going to the Florida Keys to go Tarpon fishing! Chad and Jason from Forever Barnwood will join us, and this is sure to be a crazy, memorable trip!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Florida Tarpon Fishing

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Florida Tarpon Fishing
Larry Smith Outdoors | Florida Tarpon Fishing
Larry Smith Outdoors | Florida Tarpon Fishing

Video.summary: This is our six-year fishing with acute angling aboard the Blackwater Explorer fishing the Rio Negro in the Amazon River of Brazil. Shea McIntee and the crew fish for Peacock Bass and hope to get lucky and catch a monster.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked On Fishing
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass, Pt. 3

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass, Pt. 3
Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass, Pt. 3
Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass, Pt. 3

Video.summary: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Tiny Topwater Fun
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you, in detail how to build your own Ned Rig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building A Ned Rig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin gambles with a long run in search of big pre-spawn bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Finding Pre-Spawn Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In today’s episode of Stoked on Fishing, we're aboard the 85ft El Dorado, experiencing the unpredictability of summertime fishing off the West Coast
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | 2.5-Day Party Boat Fishing Trip on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy takes you on a tour of the Wonders of Wildlife Museum in Missouri.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing - Learning About Wildlife
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is Fishing with Jay Matthews, a high school fishing coach in Alabama
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing - Fishing Coach
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks guiding, tournament fishing and Forward Facing Sonar FACTS with Captain Spencer Clark.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Spencer Clark
Video.title: Episode 1
